data.title: RED: Tests for check-shim-refs.sh detection script
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh with behavioral tests following test-check-skill-refs.sh pattern (SC6).

## Testing Strategy
Tests create temp fixture files with various violation patterns, pass them as args to check-shim-refs.sh, and assert exit codes.

## Test Cases (8+)
- test_exit_nonzero_on_direct_path: file with plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh -> exit 1
- test_exit_zero_on_clean: file using .claude/scripts/dso foo.sh -> exit 0
- test_variable_plugin_scripts: file with $PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/foo.sh -> exit 1
- test_variable_claude_plugin_root: file with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/foo.sh -> exit 1
- test_hooks_lib_source_exempt: source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/deps.sh -> exit 0
- test_shim_exempt_annotation: line with # shim-exempt: bootstrap -> exit 0
- test_shim_exempt_case_insensitive: # SHIM-EXEMPT: reason -> exit 0
- test_script_dir_file_excluded: file IN plugins/dso/scripts/ not scanned

## RED Marker
.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh: tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh [test_exit_nonzero_on_direct_path]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry exists
  Verify: grep -q "check-shim-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
